{"step_by_step_thinking": "CA-125 is a biomarker used for the diagnosis and monitoring of ovarian cancer, but it is not a screening tool. Mammography, pap smears, and office endometrial aspirates are all used for screening purposes. Mammography screens for breast cancer, pap smears screen for cervical cancer, and office endometrial aspirates can be used to screen for endometrial carcinoma.", "answer_choice": "A"}
